muscles.name: Soleus (Left)
muscles.origin: Posterior surface of head and upper 1/3 of fibula, soleal line and middle 1/3 of medial border of tibia
muscles.secondary_action: Postural muscle; venous pump of lower leg

muscles.name: Plantaris (Left)
muscles.origin: Lateral supracondylar line of femur, oblique popliteal ligament
muscles.primary_action: Weakly assists in plantarflexion and knee flexion

muscles.name: Tibialis Posterior (Left)
muscles.origin: Interosseous membrane, posterior surfaces of tibia and fibula
muscles.insertion: Navicular tuberosity, all cuneiforms, cuboid, bases of metatarsals 2-4

muscles.name: Flexor Digitorum Longus (Left)
muscles.origin: Medial part of posterior surface of tibia
muscles.insertion: Bases of distal phalanges of lateral 4 toes

muscles.name: Flexor Hallucis Longus (Left)
muscles.origin: Lower 2/3 of posterior surface of fibula, interosseous membrane
muscles.insertion: Base of distal phalanx of great toe
muscles.secondary_action: Assists in plantarflexion and inversion; pushoff during gait

muscles.name: Popliteus (Left)
muscles.origin: Lateral surface of lateral femoral condyle, posterior horn of lateral meniscus
muscles.insertion: Posterior surface of tibia above soleal line
muscles.primary_action: Medially rotates tibia to unlock knee from full extension

muscles.name: Fibularis Longus (Left)
muscles.secondary_action: Plantarflexes ankle; supports lateral & transverse arches

muscles.name: Tibialis Anterior (Right)
muscles.origin: Lateral condyle and upper 2/3 of lateral surface of tibia, interosseous membrane
muscles.insertion: Medial cuneiform, base of 1st metatarsal (medial and plantar surfaces)

muscles.name: Extensor Hallucis Longus (Right)
muscles.origin: Middle 1/3 of anterior surface of fibula, interosseous membrane
muscles.insertion: Base of distal phalanx of great toe
muscles.secondary_action: Assists in dorsiflexion and inversion of foot
